description: A customer wants to see a full amortization schedule for their auto loan.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and their auto loan account.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly locates the customer's loan.

nodes.task_description: Generate the complete amortization schedule showing the breakdown of each payment into principal and interest.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully generates the schedule for the life of the loan.

nodes.task_description: Provide the schedule to the customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends the amortization schedule to the customer's email.
